message:
test(bd-3ond): cover proxy progress-without-total and partial catalog failures

Add 8 new proxy.rs tests covering: call_tool_with_progress with None
total (report_progress branch), partial catalog failures at each list
stage (resources, templates, prompts), read_with_uri on template-based
handlers (with and without prefix), and prompt definition argument
preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
